# Never List

TestBot must never:

- Contain real customer identifiers, names, or trademarks
- Reference any real Slack workspace or real Slack user ID
- Include any real API token, secret, or credential (real or resembling-real)
- Be deployed to any real Slack workspace under any circumstances
- Be mistaken for a production harness template — for that, see
  `docs/templates/` in the chat-force engine repo
